description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a dark brown finish, featuring a single drawer on the right side and an open shelf beneath it. The desktop surface is adorned with two yellow sticky notes, a single sheet of white paper, and a circular cable grommet for wire management. The desk has sturdy, straight legs and a modesty panel at the back, providing structural support and privacy. The drawer has a simple black front with a curved handle, while the open shelf above it offers additional storage space. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the desk a classic and professional appearance. The overall design is functional and suitable for office or study environments.
description: A dark brown wooden desk with a single drawer, open shelf, cable grommet, and visible wood grain, designed for practical office or study use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the drawer, open shelf, and desktop items including sticky notes and a paper sheet.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid modesty panel and the desktop surface with visible paper and sticky notes.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the open shelf and drawer from the opposite side, with the cable grommet and desktop items visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the modesty panel and desktop surface, with sticky notes and paper in view.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side features a drawer and open shelf on the right, with the desktop surface intended for writing or computer use; the modesty panel is at the back.
